name: Hologram Silhouette Foundry
description: Construct one intangible 3D rod assembly whose front, side, and top orthographic shadows all match their dies.
natural_language: Manipulate the holographic rods until one casting satisfies the front, side, and top shadow dies.

metadata.notes: New Interaction VII–VIII candidate. The browser renders the generated physical state and records only ordinary pointer/keyboard control events; the live server and exported verifier independently replay the mechanic-specific geometry or dynamics.
